transcript: I don't even think about it, don't even think about it, can I have some, I'll give you money. I've got lots. I've got credit cards. I have a nice car. My house? An apartment in Dubai? What do you want? I'll give you anything. Your soul. I don't want to die now. I don't want to die now.
